title: Terminalis australis
taxonomy: Terminalis australis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This family is commonly known as the soapberry or soap pod tree family. Within the Sapindaceae family, Terminalis australis is part of the genus Terminalia, which comprises about 200 species of trees and shrubs. The genus Terminalia is further divided into several subgenera, including Terminalia and Myrobalanus. The classification of Terminalis australis reflects its unique characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
